runtime_note: On 2026-06-13 vicuna-host was reachable, but the NVIDIA kernel module was unavailable under kernel 6.17.0-35-generic. The host was later restored with a working NVIDIA driver/CUDA path, enabling the Qwen/RMT/SAE smoke and SciFact recapture.

permutations.rationale: Matches the longmem selector primitive most directly and preserves the sparse causal feature representation.

permutations.feature_family: log1p selected SAE values with per-row L2 normalization
permutations.rationale: Controls extreme-value dominance from always-on high-mass features and reduces hubness in sparse nonnegative space.

permutations.feature_family: category active count, total mass, max value, and causal-effect weighted mass
permutations.rationale: Uses the manifest's semantic categories and causal effects while reducing 245 sparse IDs into stable low-dimensional groups.
Tests whether the strongest causal-support features carry most of the reranking signal without all 245 dimensions.
Drops ubiquitous features that behave like activation-space hubs and near-constant document priors.

permutations.feature_family: random feature groups matched to semantic category sizes
permutations.rationale: Required control: semantic/category gains must beat same-width nonsemantic groups.
Retain only as a proxy/negative-control path because it is not compatible with the longmem core245 SAE manifest.

promotion_gate.minimum: Beat dense baseline by paired query-level nDCG/MRR with no Recall@10 loss.
promotion_gate.target: Beat the strongest text reranker on the same dense candidate groups.
promotion_gate.control_requirement: Semantic/category variants must beat matched counterfactual groups, not merely dense.
